<HUAWEI-SWITCH-PEER2>display interface description
Interface                     PHY     Protocol Description
Eth-Trunk3                    up      up       to_BJ-CE12808-DSW-01_Eth-Trunk3
Eth-Trunk4                    up      up       to_BJ-CE12808-DSW-02_Eth-Trunk4
GigabitEthernet0/0/3          up      up       to_BJ-CE6850-ACC-01_GE0/0/3
GigabitEthernet0/0/4          up      up       to_switch-core-03_GE0/0/4

<HUAWEI-SWITCH-PEER2>display ip routing-table pro bgp
Proto: Protocol        Pre: Preference
Route Flags: R - relay, D - download to fib, T - to vpn-instance, B - black hole route
------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Routing Table : _public_
         Destinations : 3        Routes : 4
Destination/Mask    Proto   Pre  Cost        Flags NextHop                                  Interface
       10.0.0.0/24  BGP  60   0             RD  192.168.1.1                                Eth-Trunk3
                    BGP  60   0             RD  192.168.1.2                                Eth-Trunk4
      10.0.1.0/24  IBGP  60   0             RD  192.168.1.3                             GigabitEthernet0/0/3
      10.0.2.0/24  EBGP  60   100           RD  192.168.1.5                             GigabitEthernet0/0/4
